title: ExperienceEntry
description: Represents a single job, role, or position in the user's career history.

experience_id.description: Unique identifier for this experience entry (UUID).

employer_name.description: Name of the employer as written on the resume.

employer_normalized.description: Canonical employer name for deduplication and search.

job_title_normalized.description: Canonical job title for search and matching.

end_date.description: End date of the role, or null if current.

industry_tags.description: Industry or domain tags for classification.

achievements.description: List of achievement IDs associated with this role.

bullets.description: List of bullet IDs associated with this role.

skills_used.description: Skill IDs used in this role.

role_narrative_id.description: Optional link to a narrative story object.
